reviews.review_title: REALLY GOOD GAME… Except one thing
reviews.review_description: This game is amazing i love the mechas and the way you customize the mech. This may be a bit far fetched but i would love to see more use of the interior controls other than the beam shot. But other than that this game is perfectly imperfect

reviews.review_title: Can't wait for the full release!
reviews.review_description: This has so much potential
Totally satisfying for a Japanese anime and super robot fan, looking forward to future updates!

I'm not quite sure I fully understand how to operate my mecha but still having lots of fun with this game. 

Looks amazing and feels like being in an anime. Lots of potential here - give it a go.

reviews.review_title: I’ll take one for all who want it
reviews.review_description: Add the heavies
If you like evangelism and want to pilot an eva here you go
Nice game, i wanted to make a mech game but my oculus app is broken and wont repair
I really love this game i wish I could customize the appearance of my mecha and I hope there will be multiplayer in the future or ai’s that can help you fight
For being a free game it is a blast a ton of cool ways to mod the mech the mech very fun
Why does the girl have physics
The game is good, but it might need some more content, but good.
This game is like pacifc rim!

The game is really fun and immersive, the mech fighting is really well done but there is some issues:1) when you finish a level you can't move but enemies' missile still can and it happened to me multiple times clearing a level and dieing from missile/2) the electro canon is garbage, not that much damage, charging and slow projectile speed, I think make it bounce between enemies and a bit more damage would help/3) just add more world, enemies and boss fights even though it ain't really an issue, continue like this
Even though there are some glitches and bugs, it is super fun. The anime character is strange but other than that it is really a good game.
I would have rated this. Game a 5 star but it keeps cashing
I literally had no idea what this was, from some weird girl blabbering nonsense in my ear to the freaking fever dream that is fighting the robot guys.

reviews.review_title: Seems ok, but game not letting me play
reviews.review_description:
After dying in my second mission, I got to the part where you choose new arm weapons, but the game didnt let me hit the battle button to start my next battle.

Overall, not terrible, but not top Mech gsmeplay like Vox Machinae or Underdogs

This game was something I downloaded because I was bored but I don’t regret a thing, it’s hard but not impossible, intense and an absolute blast 

I look forward to more updates

Incredible Gundam vibes imo, I love the customization, gameplay, even the prep is nice. I dig the music, it’s really chill in some parts but very exciting in others. A few bugs once in a while, but works in progress are just that: works in progress. I’m really looking forward to future updates and features!

My friend actually developed this game and I think it is a great game and very fun to mess around with but overall my friend gave me info and tips and I found them useful and he said that there should be an update soon.
